name: checkbox
title: Checkbox
description: A checkbox control for boolean selections with optional label.

docs.overview: Checkbox control for boolean selections with optional label
docs.accessibility: Uses role 'checkbox'. Provide a label or accessibilityLabel for screen readers.

platformNotes.macos: Uses native AppKit toggle behavior through Perry.
platformNotes.ios: Uses native UIKit toggle behavior through Perry.
platformNotes.linux: Uses native GTK toggle behavior through Perry.
platformNotes.windows: Uses current Perry Windows backend behavior.
platformNotes.web: Rendered as styled checkbox element through Perry web target.

props.name: label
props.description: Label text displayed beside the checkbox

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disable interaction and dim the checkbox

props.name: accessibilityLabel
props.description: Screen reader label (falls back to label if provided)

examples.name: controlled
examples.title: Controlled Checkbox
examples.code: Checkbox({ checked: true, label: 'Subscribed', onChange: (v) => subscribed.set(v) })

examples.name: multiple
examples.title: Multiple Checkboxes
examples.code:
VStack(8, [
  Checkbox({ label: 'Option A', onChange: (v) => a.set(v) }),
  Checkbox({ label: 'Option B', onChange: (v) => b.set(v) }),
  Checkbox({ label: 'Option C', onChange: (v) => c.set(v) }),
])

agent.summary: Checkbox for boolean selections and form toggles
